---
title: "OJS treemap"
author: "granPiero"
date: "2024-10-12"
image: "observablejs.jpg"
categories: [it]
format: 
  html:
    comments:
      utterances: 
        repo: "fischerpj/ynot"
---

> We demonstrate ojs treemaps.

```{ojs}
// Load D3
import * as d3 from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/+esm"

// Example hierarchical data
data = ({
  name: "root",
  children: [
    { name: "A", value: 120 },
    { name: "B", value: 80 },
    { name: "C", value: 50 },
    {
      name: "Group D",
      children: [
        { name: "D1", value: 40 },
        { name: "D2", value: 30 },
        { name: "D3", value: 20 }
      ]
    }
  ]
})

// Build hierarchy
root = hierarchy(data)
  .sum(d => d.value)
  .sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value)

// Layout
layout = treemap()
  .size([width, height])
  .padding(2)
  .round(true)
  .tile(treemapSquarify)

layout(root)

// Color scale
color = scaleOrdinal(schemeCategory10)

// SVG container
viewof chart = {
  const svg = select(DOM.svg(width, height))
      .style("font-family", "sans-serif")
      .style("cursor", "pointer")

  const g = svg.append("g")

  draw(root)

  function draw(node) {
    const leaves = g.selectAll("g.node")
      .data(node.children || [])
      .join("g")
      .attr("class", "node")
      .attr("transform", d => `translate(${d.x0},${d.y0})`)
      .on("click", (event, d) => {
        event.stopPropagation()
        if (d.children) zoom(d)
      })

    leaves.append("rect")
      .attr("width", d => d.x1 - d.x0)
      .attr("height", d => d.y1 - d.y0)
      .attr("fill", d => color(d.data.name))

    leaves.append("text")
      .attr("x", 4)
      .attr("y", 14)
      .text(d => d.data.name)
      .style("fill", "white")
      .style("font-size", "12px")
  }

  function zoom(node) {
    const x = width  / (node.x1 - node.x0)
    const y = height / (node.y1 - node.y0)

    g.transition().duration(750)
      .attr("transform", `translate(${-node.x0 * x},${-node.y0 * y}) scale(${x},${y})`)
  }

  return svg.node()
}

```
